adequately describe the reaction of a patient 
to his/her skilled care. Clinical notes should also provide a clear picture of the treatment, 
as well as “next steps” to be taken. Vague or subjective descriptions of the patient’s care 
should not be used. For example, terminology such as the following would not 
adequately describe the need for skilled care: 

• Patient tolerated treatment well 
• Caregiver instructed in medication management 
• Continue with POC
